creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 156394
adding CPE information to Makefile

multimedia/ffmpeg26 has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2015-3417). This patch adds CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[
0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
